learning_delta: Mechanicus gains a read-only Arsenal Registry Surface.
Future TUI buttons have reserved action sockets.
Visual surface is modular and separated from data loader.

pain_pattern.symptom: Large here-string paste into PowerShell/PSReadLine corrupts command input and leaves partial files.
pain_pattern.mitigation: Use source ZIP extraction or short file-copy commands instead of huge pasted here-strings.

evidence_index_update: Defer until commit/report step; this manual gift should be indexed after acceptance.
